title: Euler totient function phi(n): count numbers <= n and prime to n.
snippet: Euler totient function phi(n): count numbers <= n and prime to n.

title: The prime numbers.
snippet: The prime numbers.

title: Fibonacci numbers: F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2) with F(0) = 0 and F(1) = 1.
snippet: Fibonacci numbers: F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2) with F(0) = 0 and F(1) = 1.

title: Bell or exponential numbers: number of ways to partition a set of n labeled elements.
snippet: Bell or exponential numbers: number of ways to partition a set of n labeled elements.

title: Pell numbers: a(0) = 0, a(1) = 1; for n > 1, a(n) = 2*a(n-1) + a(n-2).
snippet: Pell numbers: a(0) = 0, a(1) = 1; for n > 1, a(n) = 2*a(n-1) + a(n-2).

title: Factorial numbers: n! = 1*2*3*4*...*n (order of symmetric group S_n, number of permutations of n letters).
snippet: Factorial numbers: n! = 1*2*3*4*...*n (order of symmetric group S_n, number of permutations of n letters).

title: Perfect numbers k: k is equal to the sum of the proper divisors of k.
snippet: Perfect numbers k: k is equal to the sum of the proper divisors of k.

title: Mersenne primes (primes of the form 2^n - 1).
snippet: Mersenne primes (primes of the form 2^n - 1).

title: Decimal expansion of Pi (or digits of Pi).
snippet: Decimal expansion of Pi (or digits of Pi).

title: Decimal expansion of e.
snippet: Decimal expansion of e.

title: Harmonic or Ore numbers: numbers k such that the harmonic mean of the divisors of k is an integer.
snippet: Harmonic or Ore numbers: numbers k such that the harmonic mean of the divisors of k is an integer.

title: Decimal expansion of Euler's constant (or the Euler-Mascheroni constant), gamma.
snippet: Decimal expansion of Euler's constant (or the Euler-Mascheroni constant), gamma.

title: Decimal expansion of golden ratio phi (or tau) = (1 + sqrt(5))/2.
snippet: Decimal expansion of golden ratio phi (or tau) = (1 + sqrt(5))/2.

title: Apéry's number or Apéry's constant zeta(3). Decimal expansion of zeta(3) = Sum_{m >= 1} 1/m^3.
snippet: Apéry's number or Apéry's constant zeta(3). Decimal expansion of zeta(3) = Sum_{m >= 1} 1/m^3.

title: Decimal expansion of square root of 2.
snippet: Decimal expansion of square root of 2.

title: Decimal expansion of sqrt(3).
snippet: Decimal expansion of sqrt(3).

title: The smaller of a betrothed pair.
snippet: The smaller of a betrothed pair.

title: The larger of a betrothed pair.
snippet: The larger of a betrothed pair.

title: Numerators of Cauchy numbers of first type.
snippet: Numerators of Cauchy numbers of first type.

title: Decimal expansion of Catalan's constant 1 - 1/9 + 1/25 - 1/49 + 1/81 - ...
snippet: Decimal expansion of Catalan's constant 1 - 1/9 + 1/25 - 1/49 + 1/81 - ...

title: Decimal expansion of 2^sqrt(2).
snippet: Decimal expansion of 2^sqrt(2).

title: Regular primes.
snippet: Regular primes.

title: Möbius (or Moebius) function mu(n). mu(1) = 1; mu(n) = (-1)^k if n is the product of k different primes; otherwise mu(n) = 0.
snippet: Möbius (or Moebius) function mu(n). mu(1) = 1; mu(n) = (-1)^k if n is the product of k different primes; otherwise mu(n) = 0.

title: Thue-Morse sequence: let A_k denote the first 2^k terms; then A_0 = 0 and for k >= 0, A_{k+1} = A_k B_k, where B_k is obtained from A_k by interchanging 0's and 1's.
snippet: Thue-Morse sequence: let A_k denote the first 2^k terms; then A_0 = 0 and for k >= 0, A_{k+1} = A_k B_k, where B_k is obtained from A_k by interchanging 0's and 1's.

title: Powers of 10: a(n) = 10^n.
snippet: Powers of 10: a(n) = 10^n.

title: Continued fraction for zeta(3).
snippet: Continued fraction for zeta(3).

title: Positive integers which apparently never result in a palindrome under repeated applications of the function A056964(x) = x + (x with digits reversed).
snippet: Positive integers which apparently never result in a palindrome under repeated applications of the function A056964(x) = x + (x with digits reversed).

title: Numerator of Bernoulli number B_n.
snippet: Numerator of Bernoulli number B_n.

title: Denominator of Bernoulli number B_n.

title: Decimal expansion of Champernowne constant (or Mahler's number), formed by concatenating the positive integers.
snippet: Decimal expansion of Champernowne constant (or Mahler's number), formed by concatenating the positive integers.

title: Decimal expansion of exp(Pi).
snippet: Decimal expansion of exp(Pi).

title: Decimal expansion of Mills's constant, assuming the Riemann Hypothesis is true.
snippet: Decimal expansion of Mills's constant, assuming the Riemann Hypothesis is true.

title: Decimal expansion of area under the curve 1/Gamma(x) from zero to infinity.
snippet: Decimal expansion of area under the curve 1/Gamma(x) from zero to infinity.

title: Erdős-Woods numbers: the length of an interval of consecutive integers with property that every element has a factor in common with one of the endpoints.
snippet: Erdős-Woods numbers: the length of an interval of consecutive integers with property that every element has a factor in common with one of the endpoints.

title: Decimal expansion of Viggo Brun's constant B, also known as the twin primes constant B_2: Sum (1/p + 1/q) as (p,q) runs through the twin primes.
snippet: Decimal expansion of Viggo Brun's constant B, also known as the twin primes constant B_2: Sum (1/p + 1/q) as (p,q) runs through the twin primes.

title: Triangle read by rows: T(n,k) = binomial(n,k)*(n-1)!/(k-1)!.
snippet: Triangle read by rows: T(n,k) = binomial(n,k)*(n-1)!/(k-1)!.
